'''Tyler Randell''' (born 31 August 1992) is an Australian professional [[rugby league]] footballer who plays as a {{rlp|hk}}.

He previously played for the [[Newcastle Knights]] in the [[National Rugby League|NRL]] and for [[Wakefield Trinity]] in the [[Super League]].

==Background==
Randell was born in [[Scone, New South Wales]], Australia.

He played his junior football for the Scone Thoroughbreds before switching to the [[Aberdeen Tigers]], before being signed by the [[Newcastle Knights]].

In 2012, Randell changed his surname from Sullivan to Randell.<ref name="footyfortress">{{cite web|url=http://www.footyfortress.com/Player-Profile/NYC/PlayerProfile13.html|title=The Knights Realm – NYC Player Profiles|publisher=footyfortress.com|accessdate=2014-08-30|url-status=dead|archiveurl=https://web.archive.org/web/20140903092811/http://www.footyfortress.com/Player-Profile/NYC/PlayerProfile13.html|archivedate=3 September 2014|df=dmy-all}}</ref>

==Playing career==
===Early career===
From 2009 to 2012, Randell played for the Newcastle Knights' [[National Youth Competition (rugby league)|NYC]] team.<ref name="rleague">{{cite web|url=http://rleague.com/players/Tyler-Sullivan_2755/Stats/|title=Tyler Sullivan player results, scores, news and statistics|publisher=rleague.com|accessdate=2014-08-30}}</ref><ref name="rleague2">{{cite web|url=http://rleague.com/players/Tyler-Randell_3798/Stats/|title=Tyler Randell player results, scores, news and statistics|publisher=rleague.com|accessdate=2014-08-30}}</ref> In May 2012, he re-signed with the Newcastle club on a three-year contract.<ref>[http://www.newcastleknights.com.au/news-display/Knights-resign-exciting-young-trio/54520.html ]{{dead link|date=June 2015}}</ref> 
[[File:tylerrandell.jpg|thumb|right|Randell playing for the Knights in 2013]]
In 2013, he moved on to the Knights' [[New South Wales Cup]] team.

===2014===
In 2014, he played for the [[New South Wales Residents rugby league team|New South Wales Residents]] team against the [[Queensland Residents rugby league team|Queensland Residents]].

In round 25 of the [[2014 NRL season]], Randell made his [[National Rugby League|NRL]] debut for Newcastle against the [[Parramatta Eels]].<ref name="nrl">{{cite web|url=http://www.nrl.com/updated-team-lists-round-25/tabid/10874/newsid/81314/default.aspx|title=Updated Team Lists: Round 25 - NRL.com|publisher=nrl.com|accessdate=2014-08-30}}</ref> On 21 September 2014, he was named on the [[Rugby league positions#Interchange|interchange bench]] in the 2014 New South Wales Cup Team of the Year.<ref>{{cite web|url=http://www.nswrl.com.au/news/2014/09/21/_2014_vb_nsw_cup_team_of_the_year.html|title=2014 VB NSW Cup Team of the Year|publisher=NSWRL.com.au|accessdate=2015-06-18|url-status=dead|archiveurl=https://web.archive.org/web/20150708221216/http://www.nswrl.com.au/news/2014/09/21/_2014_vb_nsw_cup_team_of_the_year.html|archivedate=8 July 2015|df=dmy-all}}</ref>

===2015===
On 6 March 2015, Randell re-signed with Newcastle on a two-year contract.<ref>{{cite web|author=|url=http://www.newcastleknights.com.au/news/2015/03/06/knights_re_sign_rand.html|title=Knights re-sign Randell – Knights|publisher=Newcastleknights.com.au|date=|accessdate=2015-06-18}}</ref>

===2016===
In February, Randell co-captained Newcastle in the [[2016 NRL Auckland Nines]].<ref>{{cite web|url=http://rugbyleagueweek.com.au/knights-announce-nines-squad/|title=Knights Announce Nines Squad - Rugby League Week|website=Rugbyleagueweek.com.au|date=2016-01-28|accessdate=2016-02-04|url-status=dead|archiveurl=https://web.archive.org/web/20160204042513/http://rugbyleagueweek.com.au/knights-announce-nines-squad/|archivedate=4 February 2016|df=dmy-all}}</ref>

===2017===
In July, he signed a two-year contract with [[Super League]] side [[Wakefield Trinity]], starting in 2018,<ref>{{cite web|url=https://www.zerotackle.com/tyler-randell-signs-wakefield-28404/ |title=Tyler Randell signs with Wakefield |publisher=Zero Tackle |date=2016-04-10 |accessdate=2017-07-24}}</ref> however in August, he was allowed to join Wakefield early after being granted a release by the Newcastle club.<ref>{{cite web|url=https://www.zerotackle.com/newcastle-knights-release-tyler-randell-28831/|title=Newcastle Knights release Tyler Randell - Zero Tackle|date=22 August 2017|publisher=|accessdate=22 August 2017}}</ref>
